seoTitle: Hawker vs Hawson — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Hawker and Hawson. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hawker and Hawson.
heading: Hawker vs Hawson — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hawker, South Australia and Hawson, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hawson has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Hawker (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hawker or Hawson safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hawker has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Hawson scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hawker scores 63/100 for bushfire risk. Hawson scores 22/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hawker or Hawson?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hawson has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
